---
title: "Sentence Memorability: Inferential Statistics"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)

# --------------------------------------------------
# File path
# --------------------------------------------------
# Edit this path if your ZIP file is in a different location.
zip_path <- "/Users/hanvitha/Downloads/Sentence Memorability.zip"

if (!file.exists(zip_path)) {
  stop("Could not find 'Sentence Memorability.zip'. Update zip_path to the correct file location.")
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# Unzip logs
# --------------------------------------------------
unzip_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "sentence_memorability_logs")
if (dir.exists(unzip_dir)) unlink(unzip_dir, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(unzip_dir, recursive = TRUE)
unzip(zip_path, exdir = unzip_dir)

log_dir <- file.path(unzip_dir, "NewLogsAnonymized")
if (!dir.exists(log_dir)) {
  stop("Folder 'NewLogsAnonymized' was not found inside the ZIP.")
}

log_files <- list.files(log_dir, pattern = "\\.log$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(log_files) == 0) {
  stop("No .log files were found inside 'NewLogsAnonymized'.")
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# Read logs
# --------------------------------------------------
read_one_log <- function(path) {
  suppressMessages(
    readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, na = c("N/A", "", "NA"))
  ) %>%
    mutate(file = basename(path))
}

raw_logs <- purrr::map_dfr(log_files, read_one_log)

# Keep only experimental events
exp_logs <- raw_logs %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Event, "^Practice"))

# Quick sanity check
required_cols <- c(
  "participant_ID", "Timestamp", "Event", "Stimulus",
  "isRepeat", "isTarget", "Reaction_time_IR",
  "Reaction_time_WR", "Accuracy WR"
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(exp_logs))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing expected columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}
```

```{r parsing-functions}
parse_trials_safe <- function(df) {
  df <- df %>% arrange(Timestamp)

  started <- FALSE
  block <- 0L
  out <- list()
  current <- NULL
  seen <- list()

  finalize_current <- function(cur, out_list) {
    if (!is.null(cur)) out_list[[length(out_list) + 1]] <- cur
    out_list
  }

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    row <- df[i, , drop = FALSE]
    event <- as.character(row$Event[[1]])

    if (identical(event, "Sentence shown")) {
      if (!started) {
        started <- TRUE
        block <- 1L
      }

      out <- finalize_current(current, out)

      stim <- as.character(row$Stimulus[[1]])
      m <- stringr::str_match(stim, "^([A-Z]+)_([0-9]+)_([AP])$")

      if (all(is.na(m))) next

      cond  <- m[, 2]
      sid   <- as.integer(m[, 3])
      voice <- m[, 4]
      base  <- paste(cond, sid, sep = "_")

      repeat_raw <- row$isRepeat[[1]]
      repeat_flag <- FALSE
      if (!is.null(repeat_raw) && !is.na(repeat_raw)) {
        repeat_flag <- tolower(trimws(as.character(repeat_raw))) == "true"
      }

      target_raw <- row$isTarget[[1]]
      target_flag <- FALSE
      if (!is.null(target_raw) && !is.na(target_raw)) {
        target_flag <- tolower(trimws(as.character(target_raw))) == "true"
      }

      prev_voices <- seen[[base]]

      rep_type <- "new"
      if (isTRUE(repeat_flag)) {
        if (!is.null(prev_voices) && voice %in% prev_voices) {
          rep_type <- "exact"
        } else if (!is.null(prev_voices) && length(prev_voices) > 0) {
          rep_type <- "similar"
        } else {
          rep_type <- "repeat_no_prev"
        }
      }

      seen[[base]] <- c(prev_voices, voice)

      current <- tibble::tibble(
        participant_ID = as.character(row$participant_ID[[1]]),
        block = as.integer(block),
        stimulus = stim,
        cond = cond,
        sid = sid,
        voice = voice,
        isTarget = target_flag,
        isRepeat = repeat_flag,
        rep_type = rep_type,
        ir_pressed = FALSE,
        ir_rt = NA_real_,
        wr_pressed = FALSE,
        wr_rt = NA_real_,
        wr_accuracy = NA_real_
      )

    } else if (identical(event, "Rest Phase started")) {
      out <- finalize_current(current, out)
      current <- NULL
      if (started) {
        block <- block + 1L
        seen <- list()
      }

    } else {
      if (is.null(current)) next

      if (stringr::str_detect(event, "IR pressed")) {
        current$ir_pressed <- TRUE
        current$ir_rt <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(row$Reaction_time_IR[[1]]))
      }

      if (identical(event, "WR pressed")) {
        current$wr_pressed <- TRUE
        current$wr_rt <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(row$Reaction_time_WR[[1]]))
        current$wr_accuracy <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(row$`Accuracy WR`[[1]]))
      }
    }
  }

  out <- finalize_current(current, out)

  if (length(out) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

assign_blocks_for_validation <- function(df) {
  df <- df %>% arrange(Timestamp)

  started <- FALSE
  block <- 0L
  block_id <- rep(NA_integer_, nrow(df))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    if (!started && df$Event[i] == "Sentence shown") {
      started <- TRUE
      block <- 1L
    }

    if (started) block_id[i] <- block

    if (started && df$Event[i] == "Rest Phase started") {
      block <- block + 1L
    }
  }

  df$block <- block_id
  df
}
```

```{r build-trial-data}
split_logs <- split(exp_logs, exp_logs$participant_ID)

trial_list <- lapply(split_logs, function(df_part) {
  df_part <- df_part[order(df_part$Timestamp), ]
  parse_trials_safe(df_part)
})

trial_data <- bind_rows(trial_list) %>%
  mutate(
    participant_ID = as.character(participant_ID),
    block = as.integer(block)
  )

validation_df <- bind_rows(lapply(split_logs, function(df_part) {
  df_part <- df_part[order(df_part$Timestamp), ]
  assign_blocks_for_validation(df_part)
})) %>%
  mutate(
    participant_ID = as.character(participant_ID),
    block = as.integer(block)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(block)) %>%
  group_by(participant_ID, block) %>%
  summarise(
    correct = sum(Event == "Validation IR pressed", na.rm = TRUE),
    wrong   = sum(Event == "Validation Wrong IR pressed", na.rm = TRUE),
    missed  = sum(Event == "Validation Missed", na.rm = TRUE),
    pass    = correct > (wrong / 2 + missed),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

valid_trials <- trial_data %>%
  inner_join(
    validation_df %>% filter(pass) %>% select(participant_ID, block),
    by = c("participant_ID", "block")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    stype = case_when(
      cond == "HH"  ~ "HH",
      cond == "HVL" ~ "HL",
      cond == "LVH" ~ "LH",
      cond == "LVL" ~ "LL",
      TRUE ~ cond
    )
  )

cat("Total parsed trials:", nrow(trial_data), "\n")
cat("Total valid trials:", nrow(valid_trials), "\n")
cat("Participants in valid trials:", dplyr::n_distinct(valid_trials$participant_ID), "\n")
```

```{r participant-level-summaries}
baseline_df <- valid_trials %>%
  filter(stype == "HF") %>%
  group_by(participant_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_old_rate = mean(ir_pressed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hit_df <- valid_trials %>%
  filter(stype %in% c("HH", "HL", "LH", "LL"), isTarget, isRepeat) %>%
  group_by(participant_ID, stype, voice) %>%
  summarise(
    hit_rate = mean(ir_pressed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

score_df <- hit_df %>%
  left_join(baseline_df, by = "participant_ID") %>%
  mutate(corrected_score = hit_rate - baseline_old_rate)

wr_df <- valid_trials %>%
  filter(stype %in% c("HH", "HL", "LH", "LL"), isTarget, isRepeat, ir_pressed, wr_pressed) %>%
  group_by(participant_ID, stype, voice, rep_type) %>%
  summarise(
    wr_acc = mean(wr_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

## Q1: repeated-measures ANOVA across sentence type

```{r q1-anova}
q1_df <- score_df %>%
  group_by(participant_ID, stype) %>%
  summarise(score = mean(corrected_score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    participant_ID = factor(participant_ID),
    stype = factor(stype, levels = c("HH", "HL", "LH", "LL"))
  )

q1_aov <- aov(score ~ stype + Error(participant_ID/stype), data = q1_df)
summary(q1_aov)
```

## Q1 post-hoc paired t-tests with Holm correction

```{r q1-posthoc}
q1_wide <- q1_df %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = stype, values_from = score) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(HH, HL, LH, LL))

pair_list <- list(
  c("HH", "HL"),
  c("HH", "LH"),
  c("HH", "LL"),
  c("HL", "LH"),
  c("HL", "LL"),
  c("LH", "LL")
)

posthoc_results <- lapply(pair_list, function(p) {
  tmp <- q1_wide %>%
    select(participant_ID, all_of(p)) %>%
    filter(complete.cases(.))

  tt <- t.test(tmp[[p[1]]], tmp[[p[2]]], paired = TRUE)

  tibble(
    comparison = paste(p[1], "vs", p[2]),
    mean_diff = mean(tmp[[p[1]]] - tmp[[p[2]]], na.rm = TRUE),
    t = as.numeric(tt$statistic),
    df = as.numeric(tt$parameter),
    p_raw = tt$p.value
  )
}) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(p_holm = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "holm"))

posthoc_results
```

## Q2: active vs passive corrected memorability

```{r q2-voice}
q2_df <- score_df %>%
  group_by(participant_ID, voice) %>%
  summarise(score = mean(corrected_score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(voice = factor(voice, levels = c("A", "P"), labels = c("Active", "Passive"))) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = voice, values_from = score) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(Active, Passive))

q2_test <- t.test(q2_df$Active, q2_df$Passive, paired = TRUE)
q2_test
colMeans(q2_df[, c("Active", "Passive")], na.rm = TRUE)
```

## Q3: subject effect vs object effect

```{r q3-subject-object}
q3_wide <- q1_df %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = stype, values_from = score) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(HH, HL, LH, LL)) %>%
  mutate(
    subject_effect = ((HH + HL) / 2) - ((LH + LL) / 2),
    object_effect  = ((HH + LH) / 2) - ((HL + LL) / 2)
  )

q3_test <- t.test(q3_wide$subject_effect, q3_wide$object_effect, paired = TRUE)
q3_test
colMeans(q3_wide[, c("subject_effect", "object_effect")], na.rm = TRUE)
```

## Q4: wording-recognition accuracy (exact vs voice-transformed)

```{r q4-wording}
q4_df <- wr_df %>%
  filter(rep_type %in% c("exact", "similar")) %>%
  group_by(participant_ID, rep_type) %>%
  summarise(wr_acc = mean(wr_acc, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = rep_type, values_from = wr_acc) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(exact, similar))

q4_test <- t.test(q4_df$exact, q4_df$similar, paired = TRUE)
q4_test
colMeans(q4_df[, c("exact", "similar")], na.rm = TRUE)
```

## Compact summary table

```{r summary-table}
summary_table <- tibble(
  Question = c(
    "Q2: Active vs Passive",
    "Q3: Subject effect vs Object effect",
    "Q4: Exact vs Voice-transformed WR"
  ),
  Statistic = c(
    paste0("t(", round(q2_test$parameter, 0), ") = ", round(q2_test$statistic, 2)),
    paste0("t(", round(q3_test$parameter, 0), ") = ", round(q3_test$statistic, 2)),
    paste0("t(", round(q4_test$parameter, 0), ") = ", round(q4_test$statistic, 2))
  ),
  p_value = c(
    q2_test$p.value,
    q3_test$p.value,
    q4_test$p.value
  )
)

summary_table
```

## Optional: formatted values to copy into report

```{r report-values}
cat("Q2 mean Active:", round(mean(q2_df$Active, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("Q2 mean Passive:", round(mean(q2_df$Passive, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n\n")

cat("Q3 mean Subject effect:", round(mean(q3_wide$subject_effect, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("Q3 mean Object effect:", round(mean(q3_wide$object_effect, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n\n")

cat("Q4 mean Exact:", round(mean(q4_df$exact, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("Q4 mean Similar:", round(mean(q4_df$similar, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
```
